titleStmt.title: SII 20.23: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 23. (B.K. No. 25 of 1936-37.) DĒVŪR, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the house-site to the left of the Rāmēśvara temple.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 951, Śukla, Pushya, ba. 1, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1029, December 24.

It records a gift, by the queen Suggaladēvi. of certain lands to Brahmarāsipaṇḍita of the Pāśupata school, for worship and offerings to god Mārasinghēśvara of Dēvapura and also for maintaining ascetics and students.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhuvanāsrayaśrīprithvīvallabhamahārājā
paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara
ya Uttarōttaraṁ salutthamire svastyanavaratapa
kalyāṇābhyudaya sahaśraphaḷabhōgabhāgi
dvitīyalakṣī viśiṣṭajanakāmathēnu Āśrita
janakalpalate rūpavidyādhari kalikālasarasvati
śrīmajagadēkamalladēvara viśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsini[yu ]
ppa śrīmatsuggaladēviyaru sakanripakāḷātīta saṁvatsa
rasataṁga 951 neya śukla saṁvatsarada tadvariṣābhyaṁ
tarada puṣya ba 1 budhavāramuttarāyaṇa saṁkrā
ntiyaṁndu svastiyamaniyāmāsanaprāṇā
yāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇajapasamādhi
panna pāśupatayōgācāryya śrīmadbrahmarāsi
paṇḍitargge dēvāpurada śrīmārasiṁghēsvara
dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ tapōdhanarggaṁ vidyārttigaḷuga(ṁ)ma
śanācchādana pathyauṣadhārtthamāgeyūra polada
paścimadisābhāgadoḷu vijayāpura
da baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka hipparageya sīmeyiṁ mūḍa
karṇṇavaḷḷiya karabhūmige naḍeva gaḍiṁbada piriya
kōloḷu dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi sarvvanamasya
māḍi biṭṭa mattaru 100 dōṇiyiṁ teṁka dē
tōṭa matta 27
completely damaged
dū kānta
dīvigege puradoḷage naḍeva gāṇa 2 pola mane 1
haḷḷadiṁ mūḍaṇa tribhōga suṁka tēja sāmya dēvargge
sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi koṭṭaru [.] Ī sthāna
doḷu brahmācāryyādi
vara mirṛdu māḍisikoṭṭa ma
Ī dēvabhāgamuva
negaḷdavaravaradē dharmma
Digital edition of SII 20.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
